policy: Do not rename a command ID when duplicate raw source records represent the same vendor and canonical syntax. Consolidate them into one normalized learning record and preserve all source file references.

consolidations.notes: The records describe the same ArubaOS-CX read-only STP command with complementary evidence metadata; no executable command rename is required.
The records describe the same Windows netstat command with complementary endpoint/process metadata; no executable command rename is required.
